context_text: <B> yeah they're better with their extras as far as getting them cards and stuff you know the union cards / <A> uh-huh / <B> and there's enough shows that are filmed in new york i would really recommend doing the extra gig in new york get your card and then come out to los angeles 'cause if you don't have your card / <A> yeah / <B> there's no point in coming out / <A> yeah
